entries.title: Bellmarked Public Reveal
entries.trigger: A Bellmarked allegiance reveal commits through an authorized public mechanism.
required_public_facts: The named public seat is now revealed as Bellmarked
The seat remains active
Only displayed public Bellmarked information is revealed
prohibited_implications: The revealed seat has lost agency

draft_script.spooky: The Bellhouse has finally placed this seat among the Bellmarked. The allegiance is public now. Motive, as ever, must prove itself by action.
draft_script.grim: This seat is publicly revealed as Bellmarked. It remains active. Only the displayed allegiance and public effects are now known.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The Bellhouse has pressed this seat into the Bellmarked record. The allegiance is public. What it preserves—or ruins—still depends on action.
draft_script.plain_system: This seat is publicly revealed as Bellmarked and remains active. Only the displayed allegiance and public effects are revealed.

performance_notes: Do not imply motive beyond public facts

candidate_guidance.human_direction: State the public allegiance cleanly, then preserve moral ambiguity and active agency.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Render the governed text exactly, with a clean factual reveal and no improvised motive or suspicion.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No traitor alarm, villain fanfare voice, accusation, pre-reveal hint, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Preserve a clean factual segment that can stand alone beside the public reveal UI.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready reveal family only; no final faction script, casting, recording, processing, runtime trigger, or production approval.

entries.title: Tidebound Public Transformation
entries.trigger: An eligible Tidebound transformation commits and becomes public.
required_public_facts: The named stable seat is now publicly Tidebound
The seat remains active
Its displayed public capabilities and restrictions replace the prior public form

draft_script.spooky: The tide has remembered this seat differently. It is Tidebound now—still active, still choosing, but by the capabilities the board now shows.
draft_script.grim: This stable seat is now publicly Tidebound and remains active. Apply the displayed Tidebound capabilities and restrictions.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The returning water has pulled more than one memory through this seat. It is Tidebound now, active beneath the form and governed by the rules displayed.
draft_script.plain_system: This stable seat is publicly Tidebound and remains active. Apply the displayed Tidebound capabilities and restrictions.

performance_notes: No monster growl or dehumanizing delivery
Intensity comes from stillness and physical specificity

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Reveal physical change while keeping intelligence, choice, and stable-seat continuity audible.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Render approved text exactly; controlled body-horror weight, no monster characterization or unscripted memories.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No zombie, sea monster, possession, loss of agency, controller replacement, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Retain a clean public-rules segment and avoid processing that obscures the unchanged seat identity.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready transformation family only; no final anatomy, content rating, casting, recording, runtime behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Bell-Witness Continuation Activated
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes its public Bell-Witness continuation transition.
required_public_facts: The prior public form is defeated
The stable seat continues as Bell-Witness
Displayed Bell-Witness actions are now available
prohibited_implications: A warning target is already selected

draft_script.spooky: The old form has ended, but the seat has not. It continues as a Bell-Witness, with the public actions now displayed.
draft_script.grim: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Bell-Witness. Apply the displayed continuation actions.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The old body has finished answering. The seat has not. It continues through the Bellhouse as a Bell-Witness, with the actions now shown.
draft_script.plain_system: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Bell-Witness. Use the displayed continuation actions.

performance_notes: Do not preselect a warning target

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Acknowledge loss, then decisively restore active agency through the continuation form.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, no funeral characterization, no elimination or target inference.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No farewell, ghost choir, player-out language, automatic target, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Keep the continuity sentence independently usable and preserve a dry, intelligible master.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuation family only; no final afterlife mechanics, casting, recording, processing, or production approval.

entries.title: Drowned Guide Continuation Activated
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes its public Drowned Guide continuation transition.
required_public_facts: The prior public form is defeated
The stable seat continues as Drowned Guide
Displayed Drowned Guide actions are now available

draft_script.spooky: The old form has gone below, but the seat still knows the way. It continues as a Drowned Guide, with the public actions now displayed.
draft_script.grim: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Drowned Guide. Apply the displayed continuation actions.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The water has taken the old form and left its direction behind. The seat continues as a Drowned Guide, active through the actions now shown.
draft_script.plain_system: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Drowned Guide. Use the displayed continuation actions.

performance_notes: No route promise beyond displayed state

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Preserve a sense of direction and active choice without promising an undisplayed route.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, clear active continuation, no route inference or ghost wail.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No drowning scream, ghost voice, route guarantee, elimination, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Preserve the public-action sentence as a standalone replay segment.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuation family only; no final route authority, casting, recording, runtime behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Lighthouse Guardian Continuation Activated
entries.trigger: A defeated stable seat completes its public Lighthouse Guardian continuation transition.
required_public_facts: The prior public form is defeated
The stable seat continues as Lighthouse Guardian
Displayed Lighthouse Guardian actions are now available
prohibited_implications: The seat became angelic or morally pure

draft_script.spooky: The old form has gone dark, but the seat remains beside the lens. It continues as a Lighthouse Guardian, with the public actions now displayed.
draft_script.grim: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Lighthouse Guardian. Apply the displayed continuation actions.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The old form has ended against the lens, and the seat remains in its light. It continues as a Lighthouse Guardian, active through the actions now shown.
draft_script.plain_system: The prior form is defeated. The stable seat remains active as a Lighthouse Guardian. Use the displayed continuation actions.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Acknowledge protection and continuity without sanctifying the form or spending its future sacrifice.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, active protective tone, no heavenly or automatic-sacrifice implication.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No angelic choir voice, martyrdom, farewell, player elimination, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Keep the active-actions sentence independently replayable and avoid permanent supernatural processing.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuation family only; no final sacrifice mechanics, casting, recording, runtime behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Invalid Action and Legal Options
entries.trigger: A public action is invalid and the authoritative interface displays currently legal alternatives.
required_public_facts: The attempted action is invalid now
Legal alternatives are displayed
No penalty applies unless separately shown
prohibited_implications: The player intentionally broke a rule

draft_script.spooky: Not that action, not yet. The legal options are displayed, and the Harbor has added no private penalty for asking.
draft_script.grim: That action is not currently legal. Choose from the displayed options. No additional penalty applies unless shown.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: That action cannot resolve in the current state. Use one of the displayed legal options. No unseen penalty is added.
draft_script.plain_system: That action is not currently legal. Choose from the displayed legal options. No additional penalty applies unless shown.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Prioritize clarity and dignity; correct the action, not the person.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Render exact governed text, neutral and concise, no improvised reason, penalty, or sarcasm.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No buzzer voice, mockery, scolding, hidden hint, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Select the shortest fully intelligible take and preserve a neutral plain-system replacement.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready system family only; no final validation wording, casting, recording, runtime behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Public Route Instability Warning
entries.trigger: A named public route enters a visible instability warning state with at least one legal response or alternative.
required_public_facts: The named public route is unstable
Displayed responses or alternatives are legal
Collapse has not committed unless separately shown
prohibited_implications: A seat on the route is automatically defeated

draft_script.spooky: The named route has begun to reconsider its shape. It is unstable, not yet lost. Use one of the responses now displayed.
draft_script.grim: The named public route is unstable. Collapse has not committed. Choose one of the displayed responses or alternatives.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The named route is splitting under its current load. It remains unresolved. Use one of the displayed responses before collapse commits.
draft_script.plain_system: The named public route is unstable. Collapse has not committed. Choose one of the displayed legal responses or alternatives.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Create urgency through exact timing and consequence language, not volume.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed warning, clearly distinguish instability from committed collapse, no hidden solution.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No panic shout, collapse-as-fact, death implication, hidden hint, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Retain a short rules-first version and align the route name through runtime text substitution rather than improvised recording.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready warning family only; no final route names, hazard timing, casting, recording, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Human Departure
entries.trigger: A human controller intentionally leaves or disconnects from a stable seat and reconnect grace begins.
required_public_facts: Human control ended or disconnected
The stable seat remains in the Tale
Reconnect grace or the displayed continuity policy now applies
prohibited_implications: The seat reset or was deleted

draft_script.spooky: Human control has ended. The stable seat remains in the Tale while the displayed continuity policy applies.
draft_script.grim: Human control has ended. The stable seat remains in the Tale while the displayed continuity policy applies.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: Human control has ended. The stable seat remains in the Tale while the displayed continuity policy applies.
draft_script.plain_system: Human control has ended. The stable seat remains in the Tale while the displayed continuity policy applies.

performance_notes: Do not speculate about why the person left

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Plain neutral delivery with no character judgment or drama.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Render exact governed text, neutral system voice, no improvisation or emotional inference.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No failure alert, defeat, punishment, character departure, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Use the shortest clean take with consistent level across all seat-control lines.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuity family only; no final disconnect policy, casting, recording, networking behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Surrogate Activation
entries.trigger: Deterministic game control activates for an existing stable seat.
required_public_facts: Game control is active
The stable seat state is unchanged except for ongoing legal actions
The seat remains eligible for authorized human takeover
prohibited_implications: A new character replaced the seat

draft_script.spooky: Game control is now active for the same stable seat. Its state remains, and authorized human takeover remains available.
draft_script.grim: Game control is now active for the same stable seat. Its state remains, and authorized human takeover remains available.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: Game control is now active for the same stable seat. Its state remains, and authorized human takeover remains available.
draft_script.plain_system: Game control is now active for the same stable seat. Its state remains, and authorized human takeover remains available.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Plain neutral delivery; controller source changed, character identity did not.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, neutral system voice, no robot character or improvised seat state.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No robot beep voice, hostile AI, replacement, reset, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Match level, pace, and tone to the departure, takeover, and return system families.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuity family only; no final surrogate logic, casting, recording, AI behavior, or production approval.

entries.title: Stable Seat Human Takeover
entries.trigger: A validated human authority transfer commits at a safe handoff for a game-controlled stable seat.
required_public_facts: Human control is active
The same stable seat and evolved state continue
Private inherited details remain on the authorized surface
prohibited_implications: The seat was healed or reset

draft_script.spooky: Human control is now active for the same evolved stable seat. Private inherited details remain on the authorized surface.
draft_script.grim: Human control is now active for the same evolved stable seat. Private inherited details remain on the authorized surface.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: Human control is now active for the same evolved stable seat. Private inherited details remain on the authorized surface.
draft_script.plain_system: Human control is now active for the same evolved stable seat. Private inherited details remain on the authorized surface.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Plain neutral confirmation; no spawn, reward, or restoration energy.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, neutral system voice, no improvised private state or reset implication.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No level-up, respawn, healing, private reveal, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Match the continuity-family level and retain a dry canonical take.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuity family only; no final takeover flow, casting, recording, private UI, or production approval.

entries.title: Reserved Player Return
entries.trigger: A returning player reclaims the same reserved stable seat at a safe handoff.
required_public_facts: The returning player reclaimed the same stable seat
The seat retains all evolved public state
Private recap remains on the authorized surface

draft_script.spooky: The returning player has reclaimed the same stable seat. Its evolved state remains. Private recap details appear only on the authorized surface.
draft_script.grim: The returning player has reclaimed the same stable seat. Its evolved state remains. Private recap details appear only on the authorized surface.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The returning player has reclaimed the same stable seat. Its evolved state remains. Private recap details appear only on the authorized surface.
draft_script.plain_system: The returning player has reclaimed the same stable seat. Its evolved state remains. Private recap details appear only on the authorized surface.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Acknowledge return without implying rollback, reward, or private knowledge.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Exact governed text, neutral system voice, no improvised recap or restoration implication.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No rewind, healing, respawn, private reveal, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Match all continuity-family recordings and retain a clean text-first take.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready continuity family only; no final reconnect policy, casting, recording, recap UI, or production approval.

entries.title: Mixed Public Outcome Attribution
entries.trigger: A mixed ending commits and public seat and faction outcome segments are displayed in authoritative order.
required_public_facts: The ending is mixed
Each spoken segment corresponds to a displayed public seat or faction outcome
No universal victory or defeat applies
prohibited_implications: The Underteller adds a moral verdict

draft_script.spooky: The Harbor has produced more than one ending, which is rather like it. Hear each public result in turn; none cancels the others.
draft_script.grim: This is a mixed ending. Attribute each displayed public seat and faction result separately. No universal victory or defeat applies.
draft_script.gore_and_dread: The Harbor closes with several incompatible truths still alive. Attribute each displayed public outcome in turn. None erases the others.
draft_script.plain_system: This is a mixed ending. Attribute each displayed public seat and faction result separately. No universal victory or defeat applies.

candidate_guidance.human_direction: Hold several public truths at once; do not tell players which result should dominate emotionally.
candidate_guidance.synthetic_direction: Render governed text and displayed attribution segments only, in authoritative order, with no improvised epilogue or verdict.
candidate_guidance.negative_direction: No victory theme voice, defeat announcement, moral judgment, hidden epilogue, celebrity imitation, or improvisation.
candidate_guidance.human_edit_plan: Record a modular opening plus separately editable attribution segments with consistent room and tone.

entries.approval_boundary: Audition-ready ending family only; no final outcome scripts, epilogues, casting, recording, or production approval.
